assumption_risk: Assumes warnings are acted on and equivalent to enforcement
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Security-critical failures continue silently until external detection
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Fail closed for security and drift checks unless signed time-bound waiver token with approver and ticket is present

assumption_risk: Assumes regex coverage is sufficient for modern secret leakage
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Obfuscated or transformed secrets bypass patterns and are committed
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Require layered detection with regex plus entropy plus context classifier plus quarantine on high-confidence findings

assumption_risk: Assumes exact schema strictness always improves safety
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Legitimate safety operations fail and teams bypass formal guardrails
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Use required-minimum schema contract with versioned compatibility and explicit migration errors

assumption_risk: Assumes missing baseline artifacts do not materially affect decisions
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Operators run updates with stale or absent threat baselines
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Block update paths when required intel artifacts are missing unless documented emergency override is approved

assumption_risk: Assumes TLS allowlist and size limits imply source trust
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Compromised allowed upstream serves poisoned but valid-looking payloads
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Enforce signature or pinned-checksum verification and immutable snapshot retention before use

assumption_risk: Assumes static taxonomy injection equals operational ML defense
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Poisoning evasion and abuse scenarios go untested in runtime workflows
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Add executable abuse tests with pass-fail thresholds and release-blocking gates

assumption_risk: Assumes reference links are adequate evidence of implementation
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Control claims drift from actual mitigations and tests
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Maintain machine-readable control-to-test matrix with required evidence status at build time

assumption_risk: Assumes code and feed regression tests proxy adversarial ML risk
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Model exploitation regressions remain undetected between releases
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Run scheduled adversarial simulations with minimum coverage and zero-failure budget for critical paths

assumption_risk: Assumes awareness content prevents prompt injection behavior
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Hostile context manipulates agents into unintended actions
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Require boundary policy engine with trusted-context separation and denylisted tool and action patterns enforced pre-execution

assumption_risk: Assumes non-interactive yes mode is safe in routine automation
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Single instruction misuse causes broad cross-repo writes
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Require scoped write tokens per repo and path and dual approval for cross-repo or destructive operations

assumption_risk: Assumes post-edit reruns catch unsafe generated changes
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Insecure logic passes superficial checks and is merged automatically
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Gate auto-remediation on semantic policy checks and high-risk diff blockers before merge eligibility

assumption_risk: Assumes regex catches contextual or transformed sensitive data
exploitation_or_failure_mode: LLM outputs leak paraphrased or encoded secrets not matching patterns
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Use DLP-style semantic detectors with mandatory redact and quarantine workflow for suspected leaks

assumption_risk: Assumes offline and no-NVD operation is acceptable for daily posture
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Stale intelligence drives outdated risk decisions while pipeline appears healthy
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Define freshness SLA and fail privileged or update workflows when SLA is exceeded

assumption_risk: Assumes capped CVE enrichment remains representative of true risk
exploitation_or_failure_mode: High-impact issues outside sample are deprioritized or missed
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Use deterministic risk-based sampling with mandatory disclosure of coverage ratio and truncation impact

assumption_risk: Assumes operators apply consistent judgment without numeric thresholds
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Inconsistent remediation actions across teams and runs
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Enforce explicit action thresholds mapped to required response for KEV and EPSS states

assumption_risk: Assumes stale-data warnings are sufficient in privileged workflows
exploitation_or_failure_mode: Stale intelligence is treated as current and residual risk is accepted unknowingly
hardening_constraint_for_solution: Elevate stale-data state to blocking for privileged operations unless signed exception is recorded
